---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who experiences it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about what changes in the UI, API, or analysis engine.

## Which phase does this fit?

- [ ] Phase 1 — POC (manual intake, core analysis engine, graph UI)
- [ ] Phase 2 — Integration (Backstage / OpsLevel / Datadog)
- [ ] Phase 3 — Intelligence (PagerDuty history, pattern matching)
- [ ] Phase 4 — Workflow (Jira/Confluence export, change hooks)
- [ ] Phase 5 — Continuous (CI/CD integration)
- [ ] Other / not sure

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, or related issues.
